nodes.speaker: Narrator
nodes.text: Located behind the corpus callosum, the Pineal Gland regulates the sleep and wake cycles.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Where am I...? What is this place?

nodes.speaker: SFX
nodes.text: The bushes rustle violently above. A heavy crash shakes the ground.

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: Argh... That was a rough landing. This place is really falling apart.

nodes.speaker: Kael
nodes.text: Who are you?! And where did you drop from?

nodes.speaker: Murial
nodes.text: I'm Murial, one of your Energeons. No time to explain right now, Kael—the tremors are destroying everything. Follow me, we need to clear the path!

nodes.speaker: Objective
nodes.text: Follow Murial to the blocked path ahead.
